meta.title: JIA LUCK SA — Enterprise AED Safety Solutions
meta.description: Premium AED units with real-time GPS tracking, compliance cabinet, team training and long warranty. Available to own or rent annually. By JIA LUCK SA (jia1669).

brand.name: JIA LUCK SA
brand.tagline: Protect every life in your organization with AED

hero.title: Turn critical seconds into a chance to survive
hero.subtitle: Complete AED solutions for factories, hotels and enterprises — premium devices with real-time GPS tracking, a compliance cabinet, team training and a long warranty. Choose to own outright or rent annually.

stats.label: Golden window to save a life

valueProps.title: Why your organization needs an AED
valueProps.subtitle: Sudden cardiac arrest can strike anyone, anywhere, anytime. A ready-to-use AED is the line between life and death.

items.title: Every second counts
items.desc: Survival chances drop by roughly 7–10% for every minute without help. A ready AED multiplies the odds of survival.

items.title: Global standards are arriving in Thailand
items.desc: AEDs are already installed in airports, transit stations, schools and malls — and are now being actively introduced into factories and hotels.

items.title: A benefit that builds confidence
items.desc: More organizations now include AEDs as part of employee welfare, reflecting genuine care and raising their safety profile.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: AED devices and trainers selected for maximum readiness.

items.name: JIA AED GPS
items.desc: An automated external defibrillator with built-in GPS that tracks device location and readiness in real time — ideal for organizations managing multiple installation sites.

items.name: Jia Zoll
items.desc: A high-quality, easy-to-use AED with voice guidance for every step — suitable for public spaces and enterprises.

items.name: AED Trainer Jia Plus
items.desc: An AED training simulator for CPR/AED courses, helping your team master the real workflow without using a live unit.

items.name: AED Trainer Jia
items.desc: A standard, budget-friendly AED trainer — ideal for schools and training centers that need many practice units.

Content tailored to factories, hotels and enterprises

items.q: What is an AED and how important is it?
items.a: An AED (automated external defibrillator) helps people in sudden cardiac arrest. Having one ready in your organization significantly increases the chance of survival.

items.q: Should I buy outright or rent?
items.a: If you want ownership and long-term cost control, choose the Safety Premium (ownership) package. If you'd rather have us manage everything with a predictable annual budget, choose Smart AED (rental).

items.q: How does the GPS system work?
items.a: Our devices track location and readiness in real time, making it easy for multi-site organizations to ensure every unit is always ready to use.
Yes. Every package includes team usage training, and we also offer separate CPR/AED training for interested organizations.
